title: TTA_HBV-OBI_NGS samplesheet schema
description: Schema for validating the pipeline samplesheet CSV

sample.description: Unique sample identifier. Alphanumeric, underscore, hyphen, dot only.
sample.errorMessage: sample must be alphanumeric (underscores, hyphens, dots allowed)

fastq_1.description: Path to R1 FASTQ file (gzipped or uncompressed)

fastq_2.description: Path to R2 FASTQ file (paired-end). Leave empty for single-end.
fastq_2.errorMessage: fastq_2 must end with .fastq, .fastq.gz, .fq, or .fq.gz (or be empty)
